finding: `tasks scope add --add <csv>` can still surface quote artifacts in closeback amendmentHistory even when the immediate scope-amendment command reports normalized addedPaths.
expectedBehavior: Every consumer of scope-amendment history should see the same normalized path list without shell quote artifacts.
evidenceOrRepro: During ATM-GOV-0183, `node atm.mjs tasks scope add --task ATM-GOV-0183 --actor codex-governance-optimizer --add packages/core/src/index.ts,atomic_workbench/atomization-coverage/path-to-atom-map.json ... --json` reported normalized addedPaths, but subsequent `taskflow close --write` showed amendmentHistory addedPaths as `"packages/core/src/index.ts` and `atomic_workbench/atomization-coverage/path-to-atom-map.json"`.
followUp: Add a regression that checks the persisted transition event and taskflow closeback amendmentHistory projection after a CSV scope amendment, not only the immediate tasks scope add response.
